message:
feat(mux): native EventBus for hot-path event dispatch (wa-3dfxb.13)

Priority-based event bus replacing Lua callbacks in performance-critical
paths. Typed event payloads with zero-allocation dispatch chain:
Native → WASM → Lua. Includes 31 tests (15 unit + 16 property-based).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

 k9.workspace = true

+serde_json.workspace = true
